title: GLM-5.2 + Z-Code (Ultra Mode - Free Tier): FABLE LEVEL PERFORMANCE!
summary: A video demonstrates configuring GLM-5.2 inside Z-Code with planning workflows, KingMode, agent skills, and MCPs to achieve frontier-level coding performance on the free tier. The workflow emphasizes structured planning, verification, testing, and iterative review over single large prompts.
writeup: The video walks through configuring GLM-5.2 inside Z-Code, combining planning workflows, KingMode, agent skills, and MCPs to reach frontier-level coding output on the free tier. The central argument is that structured planning, verification, testing, and iterative review outperform a single large prompt. Takeaways: the setup leans on test-time compute and agentic workflows rather than raw model size, and the free tier becomes viable for serious coding when paired with automation and review loops.
